title: melissa parviflora
intro: Melissa parviflora, also known as small-leaved lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Melissa parviflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Melissa parviflora include teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
